## Checklist

- [ ] `go test ./...` passes
- [ ] `go test -race ./internal/mcp/... ./cmd/...` passes
- [ ] `gofmt -l .` prints nothing
- [ ] `go vet ./...` is clean
- [ ] New behaviour has tests
- [ ] Godoc comments are self-contained (no references to external files or spec sections)
- [ ] If ent schema changed: `go generate ./...` was run and generated files are committed
